creator: kbyanc@posi.net
text:
Wrong address in one the ports I maintain...

Fix: 

-MAINTAINER=    kbyanc@alcnet.com
+MAINTAINER=    kbyanc@posi.net

 MAN1=          cgi-fcgi.1
 MAN3=          FCGI_Accept.3 FCGI_Finish.3 FCGI_SetExitStatus.3 FCGI_StartFilterData.3--VoQ5HWzqgcSLUyU87N0Spwrk0fdZxmwkg4CwxPecabD1yB8N
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig       Wed Aug 11 11:38:07 1999
+++ Makefile    Wed Aug 11 11:38:45 1999
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@
 CATEGORIES=    www
 MASTER_SITES=  http://fastcgi.idle.com/dist/
